---
title: "test_phase_89_verification.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_89_verification.py"
loc: 39
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.29
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating mock_db, test_mimir_aesthetic_breach. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)

### Exports
- `mock_db`
- `test_mimir_aesthetic_breach`
- `test_mimir_structural_breach`
- `test_mimir_maintainability_suggestion`
- `test_rpc_suggestion_retrieval`
